resources.string: Block Google Play Store from updating itself.
Turn this off to hide the launcher entry. You can still open the module from Xposed or LSPosed settings.
If the icon remains visible, disable `Force apps to show launcher icons` in LSPosed settings.
Google Play Store is not installed.
Unable to read the installed Play Store version.
Enable the module, limit its scope to Google Play Store, then force stop and reopen Play Store.
Older versions show 999.999.999 directly. On Play Store v47+, tap "Update Play Store" and confirm it reports that the store is up to date.
